title: Superb Warfare expanded

Functional military vehicles including tanks, helicopters, and more

 Built upon Superb Warfare and Timeless and Classics Zero
body:
Features: 

• Realistic firearms and ballistics

• Functional military vehicles including tanks, helicopters, and more

• Authentic combat mechanics and equipment

• Built upon Superb Warfare and Timeless and Classics Zero

• Optimized for multiplayer and server play

 

Includes:

• Superb Warfare (base mod)

• Timeless and Classics Zero

• +20 other carefully selected mods enhancing realism and performance
